description: Configure the Wazuh File Integrity Monitoring (syscheck) module in the 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' container (/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf) to meet PCI-DSS requirements. The configuration must include a scan frequency of 3600 seconds, enabled 'alert_new_files', and a file_limit of 100000 entries. The following directories must be monitored: /etc (realtime='yes', check_all='yes'), /usr/bin (realtime='yes'), /usr/sbin (realtime='yes'), /var/www (whodata='yes'), and /boot (check_sha256sum='yes'). Additionally, include ignore entries for /etc/mtab, /etc/hosts.deny, and /etc/mail/statistics. The Wazuh manager must be restarted to apply the new configuration.
